title: Individual Extraction
author: Plazi Verein
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The presentation integrates Plazi's learning courses. Here the steps to extract annotations and attributes from a paper using GoldenGATE Imagine, Plazi’s tool for data extraction from publications, are presented.
steps_raw: The presentation integrates Plazi's learning courses. Here the steps to extract annotations and attributes from a paper using GoldenGATE Imagine, Plazi’s tool for data extraction from publications, are presented.
